name: Tundra Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair - Natural - Christopher Knight Home: Weather-Resistant, No Assembly Required, 250lb Capacity
description: The Christopher Knight Home Tundra Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair gives you a neutral yet sophisticated look that will compliment any outdoor bar area. This Bar Chair is made of sturdy acacia wood and offers a foot rail to add to the comfort of the stool. When the stool is not in use it can be folded for easy storage. Purchase 1 or more of this Christopher Knight Home Tundra Acacia Wood Folding Patio Bar Chair to add extra seating to your backyard, garden or patio.
